name: FLOWERS FOODS INC
summary: Flowers Foods, Inc. is the second-largest producer and marketer of packaged bakery foods in the United States. Founded in 1919 and headquartered in Thomasville, Georgia, the company produces breads, buns, rolls, snack items (bars, cakes, cookies, crackers), bagels, English muffins, tortillas, and baking mixes. Products are sold under brands including Nature's Own, Dave's Killer Bread, Canyon Bakehouse, Simple Mills, Wonder, and Tastykake across retail and foodservice channels.
